name: Velor Digital
description: Velor Digital builds premium websites, automation systems, booking workflows, marketing engines, and business dashboards for service companies across Ottawa, Gatineau, and Ontario.
positioning: If this is what we build for ourselves, imagine what we build for your business.

services.name: Foundation
services.summary: Premium website design and SEO-ready development for businesses that need a premium online identity.

services.name: Operations
services.summary: Booking systems, CRM, and automation for businesses that want their workflow to run smoother.

services.name: Marketing Manager
services.summary: Outsourced marketing management including ads, landing pages, and reporting.

services.name: Digital Department
services.summary: A full outsourced digital department combining website, automation, marketing, CRM, booking, AI, and Velor OS.

product.name: Velor OS
product.summary: A business operating platform for service companies: client CRM, booking manager, invoicing, file vault, payment overview, team roles, reports, and automation-ready workflows.

policy.notes: Pricing is scoped per project on a strategy call. Do not fabricate pricing figures.
